subcodes.first_line: We send the fragrances of Ridván unto the people of the All-Merciful, that it may sanctify them from sorrows in these days wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نرسل نفحه الرضوان الی امه الرحمن لتقدسها عن الاحزان فی هذه الایام التی فیها
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
